notes_for_use: This template is for OFFLINE / PRIVATE training only.
It is not bundled into the ScratchLab app and is not consumed at runtime.
Do NOT add source disc names, ripper tool names, vendor product names, absolute home-directory paths, or any rights / provenance metadata. See docs/training_dataset_plan.md for the full blocklist.
Only fill in the safe product-facing fields below.
Each entry describes one labelled training clip referenced by a clip_id, not by an absolute path.

clips.notes: Clean reference of a steady baby scratch.
